question: 每个店铺的订单数量和总金额
sql: SELECT store_id, COUNT(*) AS order_count, SUM(pay_amount) AS total_revenue FROM orders WHERE order_status != 'cancelled' GROUP BY store_id ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

question: 评分高于全站平均水平的店铺有哪些
sql: SELECT store_id, AVG(description_score) AS avg_score FROM store_ratings GROUP BY store_id HAVING AVG(description_score) > (SELECT AVG(description_score) FROM store_ratings)

question: 评分高于全站平均水平的商家有哪些

question: 每个用户的消费金额排名
sql: SELECT user_id, total_spent, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY total_spent DESC) AS spend_rank FROM (SELECT user_id, SUM(pay_amount) AS total_spent FROM orders WHERE order_status != 'cancelled' GROUP BY user_id) t

question: 每个客户的消费金额排名
sql: SELECT user_id, total_spent, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY total_spent DESC) AS spend_rank FROM (SELECT user_id, SUM(pay_amount) AS total_spent FROM orders WHERE order_status != 'cancelled' GROUP BY user_id) t

question: 从未下过单的用户有哪些
sql: SELECT user_id, username FROM users WHERE user_id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM orders WHERE order_status != 'cancelled')

question: 退款率高于平均水平的商品有哪些
sql: SELECT product_id, SUM(CASE WHEN refund_status = 'approved' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) AS refund_rate FROM order_items GROUP BY product_id HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN refund_status = 'approved' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) > (SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN refund_status = 'approved' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) FROM order_items)

question: 退款率比平均高的商品
sql: SELECT product_id, SUM(CASE WHEN refund_status = 'approved' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) AS refund_rate FROM order_items GROUP BY product_id HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN refund_status = 'approved' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) > (SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN refund_status = 'approved' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) FROM order_items)

question: 退款率比平均高的货品
sql: SELECT product_id, SUM(CASE WHEN refund_status = 'approved' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) AS refund_rate FROM order_items GROUP BY product_id HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN refund_status = 'approved' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) > (SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN refund_status = 'approved' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) FROM order_items)

question: 退款率比平均高的物品
sql: SELECT product_id, SUM(CASE WHEN refund_status = 'approved' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) AS refund_rate FROM order_items GROUP BY product_id HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN refund_status = 'approved' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) > (SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN refund_status = 'approved' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) FROM order_items)

question: 各月份的订单数量变化趋势
sql: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM orders GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month

question: 各月份的交易数量变化趋势
sql: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM orders GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month

question: 每月下单数量统计
sql: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM orders GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month

question: 各店铺每月的GMV是多少
sql: SELECT store_id, DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') AS month, SUM(total_amount) AS monthly_gmv FROM orders WHERE order_status != 'cancelled' GROUP BY store_id, DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY store_id, month

question: 各商家每月的GMV是多少
sql: SELECT store_id, DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') AS month, SUM(total_amount) AS monthly_gmv FROM orders WHERE order_status != 'cancelled' GROUP BY store_id, DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY store_id, month

question: 各商户每月的GMV是多少
sql: SELECT store_id, DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') AS month, SUM(total_amount) AS monthly_gmv FROM orders WHERE order_status != 'cancelled' GROUP BY store_id, DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY store_id, month

question: 各卖家每月的GMV是多少
sql: SELECT store_id, DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') AS month, SUM(total_amount) AS monthly_gmv FROM orders WHERE order_status != 'cancelled' GROUP BY store_id, DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY store_id, month

question: 按月统计每个店铺的成交总额
sql: SELECT store_id, DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') AS month, SUM(total_amount) AS monthly_gmv FROM orders WHERE order_status != 'cancelled' GROUP BY store_id, DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY store_id, month

question: 按月统计每个商家的成交总额
sql: SELECT store_id, DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') AS month, SUM(total_amount) AS monthly_gmv FROM orders WHERE order_status != 'cancelled' GROUP BY store_id, DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY store_id, month

question: 按月统计每个商户的成交总额
sql: SELECT store_id, DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') AS month, SUM(total_amount) AS monthly_gmv FROM orders WHERE order_status != 'cancelled' GROUP BY store_id, DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY store_id, month

question: 按月统计每个卖家的成交总额
sql: SELECT store_id, DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') AS month, SUM(total_amount) AS monthly_gmv FROM orders WHERE order_status != 'cancelled' GROUP BY store_id, DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY store_id, month

question: 各月的GMV趋势
sql: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') AS month, SUM(total_amount) AS gmv FROM orders GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month

question: 全平台的总GMV是多少
sql: SELECT SUM(total_amount) AS total_gmv FROM orders

question: 各店铺的GMV排名
sql: SELECT store_id, SUM(total_amount) AS store_gmv FROM orders WHERE order_status != 'cancelled' GROUP BY store_id ORDER BY store_gmv DESC

question: 全平台的客单价是多少
sql: SELECT SUM(pay_amount) / COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS avg_order_value FROM orders WHERE order_status != 'cancelled'

question: 各店铺的客单价
sql: SELECT store_id, SUM(pay_amount) / COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS avg_order_value FROM orders WHERE order_status != 'cancelled' GROUP BY store_id ORDER BY avg_order_value DESC

question: 订单转化率是多少
sql: SELECT COUNT(pay_time) / COUNT(*) AS conversion_rate FROM orders

question: 各店铺的转化率
sql: SELECT store_id, COUNT(pay_time) / COUNT(*) AS conversion_rate FROM orders GROUP BY store_id ORDER BY conversion_rate DESC

question: 整体退款率是多少
sql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN refund_status = 'approved' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) AS refund_rate FROM order_items

question: 各商品的退款率
sql: SELECT product_id, SUM(CASE WHEN refund_status = 'approved' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) AS refund_rate FROM order_items GROUP BY product_id ORDER BY refund_rate DESC

question: 用户复购率是多少
sql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN order_count >= 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) AS repurchase_rate FROM (SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM orders WHERE order_status != 'cancelled' GROUP BY user_id) t

question: 各店铺的复购率
sql: SELECT store_id, SUM(CASE WHEN order_count >= 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) AS repurchase_rate FROM (SELECT store_id, user_id, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM orders WHERE order_status != 'cancelled' GROUP BY store_id, user_id) t GROUP BY store_id ORDER BY repurchase_rate DESC

question: DSR三项均分都高于4.5的店铺有哪些
sql: SELECT store_id, AVG(description_score) AS avg_desc, AVG(service_score) AS avg_serv, AVG(logistics_score) AS avg_logi FROM store_ratings GROUP BY store_id HAVING AVG(description_score) > 4.5 AND AVG(service_score) > 4.5 AND AVG(logistics_score) > 4.5

question: 各店铺的好评率
sql: SELECT store_id, SUM(CASE WHEN description_score >= 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) AS good_rate FROM store_ratings GROUP BY store_id ORDER BY good_rate DESC

question: 各优惠券的核销率
sql: SELECT coupon_id, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'used' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) AS redeem_rate FROM user_coupons GROUP BY coupon_id ORDER BY redeem_rate DESC

question: 核销率超过60%的优惠券有哪些
sql: SELECT coupon_id, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'used' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) AS redeem_rate FROM user_coupons GROUP BY coupon_id HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'used' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) > 0.6

question: ROI最高的活动是哪个
sql: SELECT campaign_id, campaign_name, actual_gmv / cost AS roi FROM campaigns WHERE cost > 0 ORDER BY roi DESC LIMIT 1

question: 各活动的ROI排名
sql: SELECT campaign_id, campaign_name, actual_gmv / cost AS roi FROM campaigns WHERE cost > 0 ORDER BY roi DESC

question: 目标完成率超过100%的活动有哪些
sql: SELECT campaign_id, campaign_name, actual_gmv / target_gmv AS completion_rate FROM campaigns WHERE target_gmv > 0 AND actual_gmv / target_gmv > 1.0

question: 各快递公司的签收率
sql: SELECT carrier, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'delivered' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) AS delivery_rate FROM shipments GROUP BY carrier ORDER BY delivery_rate DESC

question: 妥投率最高的快递公司是哪个
sql: SELECT carrier, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'delivered' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) AS delivery_rate FROM shipments GROUP BY carrier ORDER BY delivery_rate DESC LIMIT 1

question: 各快递公司的平均送达时间
sql: SELECT carrier, AVG(TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, ship_time, deliver_time)) AS avg_hours FROM shipments WHERE deliver_time IS NOT NULL GROUP BY carrier ORDER BY avg_hours

question: 平均物流耗时是多少小时
sql: SELECT AVG(TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, ship_time, deliver_time)) AS avg_hours FROM shipments WHERE deliver_time IS NOT NULL
